description_long: This hamburger features a soft, lightly browned plain white bun with a smooth, matte finish. The top and bottom buns are slightly domed and enclose a single, thick beef patty. A slice of yellow American cheese is visible, partially melted and peeking out from beneath the patty, adding a pop of color. The hamburger does not display any additional toppings such as lettuce, tomato, onions, or pickles, giving it a classic, minimalist appearance. The bun surface is free of sesame seeds and appears pillowy and fresh. No packaging or external elements are present, and the hamburger is presented as a standalone food item.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain white bun, thick beef patty, and a slice of yellow cheese, with no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with the cheese slice slightly protruding from the front, and the patty and bun are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cheese slice peeking out more prominently at the bottom center, with the bun and patty maintaining their rounded shape.
description_view_2: The hamburger appears more uniform from this angle, with only a small hint of cheese visible beneath the patty.
description_view_3: The cheese is barely visible, and the focus is on the smooth, rounded bun and the thick patty.
attribute_topping_arrangement: A single slice of cheese is layered directly beneath the patty, with no other toppings present. The cheese is partially visible around the edges, and the rest of the hamburger is free of additional ingredients.
